scene: A close-up portrait of a golden cavoodle dog's face, identical to the reference — same wavy golden-caramel fur, same dark round eyes, same brown nose. The dog has a peaceful, content expression with half-closed blissful eyes. A small glowing golden halo floats above his head. The background is a soft gradient from dark navy (#0f1117) at the edges to a subtle warm golden glow behind the dog's head. The fur catches soft golden light. This is a logo/avatar image — clean composition, face centered, reads well at small sizes. Shot with 85mm f/2, ISO 200, soft even lighting.
